entities.name: AGROFORESTRY
entities.description: Combining shrubs, trees, crops, and livestock to manage rural land resources for economic, environmental, and social benefits

entities.name: SHRUBS
entities.description: Woody plants integrated into agroforestry systems

entities.name: TREES
entities.description: Woody perennials that store carbon and diversify land use in agroforestry

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural plants grown in combination with trees in agroforestry systems

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Domesticated animals integrated into agroforestry for resource management

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country implementing the National Agroforestry Policy 2014

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GASES
entities.description: Atmospheric gases whose reduction is a goal of agroforestry and international protocols

entities.name: CARBON
entities.description: Element stored in topsoil and biomass to mitigate climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental shift that agroforestry helps minimize and adapt to

entities.name: NATIONAL AGROFORESTRY POLICY 2014
entities.description: Indian policy promoting agroforestry for sustainable land management and improved livelihoods

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE LAND MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing land resources to ensure long-term productivity and environmental health

entities.name: KYOTO PROTOCOL
entities.description: International agreement under the UNFCCC to reduce greenhouse gas emissions

entities.name: UNFCCC
entities.description: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change
